title: Different users → completely isolated (no shared workspace/state)
evidence: All 7 TC-005 assertions passed in 1720ms (304/304 total tests pass): - ✓ TC-005: provision tenant A (T_TC005/U_TC005_A) succeeds with status=NEW - ✓ TC-005: provision tenant B (T_TC005/U_TC005_B) succeeds with status=NEW - ✓ TC-005: tenant A and tenant B have different tenant IDs (sha256 of different principals) - ✓ TC-005: tenant A and tenant B have different relay_token values - ✓ TC-005: tenant A and tenant B have different data_dir paths (each contains own tenantId) - ✓ TC-005: tenant A and tenant B have different container_name values - ✓ TC-005: marker file written to tenant A workspace is NOT visible in tenant B workspace Complete filesystem and identity isolation confirmed between T_TC005:U_TC005_A and T_TC005:U_TC005_B.
